Video.summary: Professional R&B artist Nathaniel disputes his girlfriend LeAnn's accusation of keeping their relationship a secret.
Video.title: Hall vs. Peterson

Video.summary: Tensions run high in the courtroom as Gayla and James decide if they should call off their wedding.
Video.title: Williams vs. Edwards

Video.summary: Irma demands a refund for the party bus she rented from LaToya, stating it wasn't decorated properly.
Video.title: Unhappy Birthday Party

Video.summary: Mikeyah and Marcus have come before the judges to determine if they should stay or walk away.
Video.title: Grice vs Haynes

Video.summary: Past infidelity and the discovery of a homoerotic dating profile have husband and wife Laffiama and Amy feuding in court.
Video.title: Murillo vs. Murillo

Video.summary: Yuri she said Bryan promised her a big bucks photobook, but when her it failed, their party petered out.
Video.title: The Party is Over

Video.summary: Friends Matt and James said everything was ok until their other roommate, David, turned into Goliath and became a violent religious fanatic, slinging shoes and punching faces.
Video.title: The Christian Crusader

Video.summary: Comedian Allan Cunningham is suing his former fan for the money she owes him for a private party.
Video.title: Heckling the Plaintiff

Video.summary: A troubled 15-year-old boy goes through the booking process.
Video.title: Scared Straight? We Hope So!

Video.summary: A dangerous fugitive is wanted for assult and battery. A deputy stops and unregistrered vehicle. A look at the daily procedures deputies must follow before going on patrol.
Video.title: The Man in the Van

Video.summary: Deputy Turnbull makes a visit to a known flop house.
Video.title: Dopers Come Together

Video.summary: Deputy Payne exposes the jumbled and dysfunctional mind of a habitual alcoholic.
Video.title: Drunk as a Skunk

Video.summary: WENET plans and executes a large Methamphetamine cartel raid.
Video.title: Mexican Cartel Meth House

Video.summary: Deputy Fontana arrests a central figure in a major ID theft ring.
Video.title: Mobile ID Theft Factory

Video.summary: Deputy Adams eradicates an indoor and outdoor marijuana grow.
Video.title: But I have a Prescription!

Video.summary: A surprise witness and a bombshell reveal blow the lid off Joshua's property-damage claim against girlfriend Tonya.
Video.title: Brown vs. Bell

Video.summary: An exhausted mother gets a surprise after putting her dreams on hold for her family.
Video.title: Prince vs. Thornton

Video.summary: A Miami couple's future is at stake as differing dreams and financial conflicts test their six-year relationship.
Video.title: Benatar vs. Porciello

Video.summary: The results of a polygraph test will reveal if webcam star and sugar baby Andrea has been cheating on her boyfriend, Justin.
Video.title: Stephens vs. Harris

Video.summary: Breanna and Jonathan face a relationship crossroads, navigating trust, age gaps and uncertain futures in their complicated polyamorous love life.
Video.title: Minor vs. Sanders

Video.summary: Ricky sues his ex-girlfriend, Jada, saying she stole $800 of his child support money to buy tickets to a Beyoncé concert.
Video.title: Colbert vs. Adams

Video.summary: Samantha sues her ex, Matthew, for $500 or the return of their dog, Daisy, claiming he's aggressive and unfit to care for her. Matthew counters, insisting Daisy is his since he saved her from the pound.
Video.title: Exes at War

Video.summary: Charles Louis sues Carnel Scott for $1,359, claiming he was evicted from an illegal rooming house with 13 residents, including criminals and drug users. Carnel defends his legal operation, accusing Charles of being disruptive and violent.
Video.title: Sketchy Rental Situation

Video.summary: Crystal sues her ex-friend Claudia for $800, claiming she used her cruise payment for another guest after Crystal canceled due to her son’s accident. Claudia countersues for $1,000, alleging harassment and car damage.
Video.title: Cruise Catastrophe

Video.summary: Anissa Williams sues her dad, Nathaniel Green, for $5,000, claiming he owes her money despite the heartbreak. Nathaniel argues the money was family kindness and countersues for $1,000 for slander.
Video.title: Abandoned by Her Father

Video.summary: Frank sues his daughter Patricia, claiming she pocketed $2,010 in insurance money after a car accident. Patricia says the car was a gift, she paid insurance, and blames his new partner for turning him against her.
Video.title: Father/Daughter Crisis

Video.summary: Nelson is here to sue his sister who has battled a heroin addiction for two unpaid loans.
Video.title: Seeking Treatment for Heroin

Video.summary: Tyrone claims his ex wife Tania got him falsely arrested 3 times so he's here to sue her for $3,000.
Video.title: Reformed Pimp Sues His Madam

Video.summary: Terry is suing his ex-wife because he lent her money for their daughter (18) to have surgery on her jaw.
Video.title: A Host of Issues

Video.summary: Amanda is suing her nail tech Jonyell after paying her to take a nail class but she breached their contract.
Video.title: Getting Nailed for Class Tuition

Video.summary: Anastasia is a hair stylist here to sue one of her clients for an unpaid loan and emotional distress.
Video.title: Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan

Image.alt: Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan
Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan
Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan

Video.summary: Allison says her baby daddy rarely sees their child, and she is suing for the cost of ballet classes and bills
Video.title: Too Passionate for Parenting

Video.summary: Kentra wants a paternity test after the man who signed her birth certificate has been in and out of her life.
Video.title: Believing the Birth Certificate

Video.summary: A man says he dated the defendant for 20 years, and they have a child together, but now that he's married, the defendant has become extremely jealous of his new relationship; he sues for breach of contract, an electric bill and emotional distress.
Video.title: Love, Lies, and Legal Ties

Video.summary: Mark is suing his sister over his home's repair work. She claims that he is lying and exaggerating.
Video.title: A Riff in the Family

Video.summary: The claws come out when two sisters slug it out. When the bombshells drop the emotions fly.
Video.title: Sisters Slug it Out

Video.summary: While shopping for a website designer Brent met Joe but what a tangle website of woes did they weave.
Video.title: Website of Woes

Video.summary: Darious claims his cousin barged into his car, got caught speeding, borrowed money to go to clubs, and more.
Video.title: On The Road

Video.summary: Destiny is suing ex-roomate Bisa for unpaid rent. Bisa is counter suing for moving fees and mental anguish.
Video.title: Too Close for Comfort

Video.summary: Two siblings go toe to toe and tell different stories. Reuinted after years apart, the battle begins again.
Video.title: He Said She Said

Video.summary: Shaneequa loved her precious pooch but when she could no longer care for her she found a friend that could.
Video.title: Screwing the Pooch

Video.summary: Is this contractor crooked as a bent nail or is this homeowner's behavior in need of renovations?
Video.title: One Door Closes

Video.summary: Christopher is suing his brother Ashlee for punches his tooth out over some spilled juice.
Video.title: My House My Couch

Video.summary: Deputy Miller gets physical with an aggressive transient. Deputy Turnbull demonstrates an exercise in mental gymnastics.
Video.title: Hostile & Homeless

Video.summary: The Western El Dorado Narcotics Enforcement Team shines a light on the destruction of our public land by illegal commercial Mexican cartel grows.
Video.title: Marijuana vs. the Environment

Video.summary: Deputy Fontana responds to an overturned vehicle. An intoxicated driver is found sleeping behind the wheel of his vehicle.
Video.title: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy

Image.alt: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy

Video.summary: Deputy Payne responds to a vehicle on fire with a teenager trapped inside.
Video.title: Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves

Image.alt: Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves
Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves
Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves

Video.summary: Deputy Campora arrests two men in possession of drugs and with felony warrants. Deputies Brady and Ford enforce a restraining order.
Video.title: What Bump in My Pants?
